popularStory.description:
HOWARD, Sir John (c.1366-1437), of Wiggenhall and East Winch, Norf., Stoke Nayland, Suff., Stansted Mountfichet, Essex, and Fowlmere, Cambs.

Published in The History of Parliament: the House of Comm …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Howard於1366年出生在英國素福爾可時，他的父親Sir Robert Howard30歲，母親Margaret Scales31歲。他於1378年與Lady Margaret Plaiz在英國英格蘭諾福爾可維根哈爾 聖 瑪麗 馮 維金結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1437年11月17日在巴勒斯坦耶路撒冷享年71歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Howard于1366年出生在英国素福爾可时，他的父亲Sir Robert Howard30岁，母亲Margaret Scales31岁。他于1378年与Lady Margaret Plaiz在英国英格兰諾福爾可維根哈爾 聖 瑪麗 馮 維金结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1437年11月17日在巴勒斯坦耶路撒冷享年71岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可。

nameMeanings.name: Howard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, from the Middle English personal names Huward (also Howard) and Heward, from Old French Huard (itself from ancient Germanic Hugihard, hugi- ‘mind, understanding, spirit’ + hard- ‘hardy, bold’). As Hugh appears in Middle English as both How and Hew, this is the definite origin of Heward and a source of Howard. This surname is also very common among African Americans. See Hugh .

English: from the Middle English personal name Haward or Howard, usually an Anglicized form of Old Danish Hāwarth (Old Norse Hávarthr, from há ‘high’ + varthr ‘guard, guardian, warden’). Alternation between Haward and Howard may have led to later confusion with Hayward .
English: occasionally a variant of   Ewart   2.

variants.name: Fogarty
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, James Patrick, Kieran, Seamus, Siobhan.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Fógartaigh ‘son of Fógartach’, a personal name from fógartha ‘proclaimed, banished, outlawed’. It is sometimes Anglicized as Howard .

variants.name: Huggard
meanings: English: of Norman origin, from the medieval personal name Hugard, a variant of Huard (see Howard ). This surname is also established in Ireland (Kerry).

variants.name: Hayward
meanings: occupational name from Middle English hayward ‘keeper of the hedges and enclosures’ (Old English hēgweard), a manorial officer in charge of the common fields who protected corn and hay from cattle, theft, or damage, and supervised the harvest.

variants.name: Huard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Aime, Adelard, Jacques, Jean-Pierre, Lucien, Marcel, Alcide, Amiee, Armand, Aurele, Clermont, Fernard.
French and Channel Islands (Jersey): from the Old French personal name Huart, either identical in origin with Howard 1 or a pet form of Old French Hue .
History: Jean Huard from Courson-Monteloup in Essonne, France, married Anne-Marie Amiot in Quebec City, QC, in 1670.

variants.name: Hugh
meanings: English, Welsh, and Scottish (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Hue, from ancient Germanic Hugo (ultimately derived from hugi- ‘mind, spirit’). This was a very popular name in England after the Norman Conquest, partly due to the reputation of Saint Hugh of Lincoln (1140–1200), who was born in Burgundy and who established the first Carthusian monastery in England.
Scottish and Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal name Aodh, a derivative of a Gaelic word meaning ‘fire’. See Hughes .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 邱 and 丘, based on their Hakka pronunciation; see   Qiu   1 and 2.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Howard was born in 1366, in Suffolk, England, his father, Sir Robert Howard, was 30 and his mother, Margaret Scales, was 31. He married Lady Margaret Plaiz in 1378, in Wiggenhall St Mary the Virgin, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 17 November 1437, in Jerusalem, Palestine, at the age of 71, and was buried in Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Howard est né en 1366, à Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert Howard, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Margaret Scales, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margaret Plaiz en 1378, à Wiggenhall St Mary the Virgin, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 17 novembre 1437, à Jerusalem, Palestine, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Howard 1366 in Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert Howard 30 und seine Mutter Margaret Scales 31. Er hat 1378 in Wiggenhall St Mary the Virgin, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Lady Margaret Plaiz geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 17. November 1437 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Jerusalem, Palästina und wurde in Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Howard è nato il nel 1366 nel Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Sir Robert Howard, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Scales, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Lady Margaret Plaiz nel 1378, nel Wiggenhall St Mary the Virgin, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 17 novembre 1437, nel Jerusalem, Palestina, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Howardが1366年にイギリススフォルクで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Howardは30歳，母Margaret Scalesは31歳であった。1378年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクウィグジェンハル スト マリー ス バージンでLady Margaret Plaizと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1437年11月17日にパレスチナジャーウサレムで71歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクにて埋葬された。

ko.Wiggenhall, Norfolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 위겐홀 스트 메리 테 버긴
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Howard(이)가 1366년 영국 수폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Howard(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Scales(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1378년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 위겐홀 스트 메리 테 버긴에서 Lady Margaret Plaiz(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1437년 11월 17일 팔레스타인 제루사렘에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Howard nasceu em 1366, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert Howard, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Scales, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Margaret Plaiz em 1378, em Wiggenhall St Mary the Virgin, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 17 de novembro de 1437, em Jerusalem, Palestina, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Howard родился в 1366 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Howard было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Scales, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margaret Plaiz в 1378 г. в местности вигенолл ст мэри т виргин, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер 17 ноября 1437 г. в местности джирсеилем, Палестина в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Howard nació en 1366, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert Howard, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Margaret Scales, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Lady Margaret Plaiz en 1378, en Wiggenhall St Mary the Virgin, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 17 de noviembre de 1437, en Jerusalem, Palestina, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Suffolk, Inglaterra.
